use_cases: Displaying trending spark items with counts and images in a scrollable horizontal carousel
Showcasing featured media content with navigation arrows on e-commerce platforms
Creating image galleries with smooth scroll animations for creator portfolios
Building product carousels with dynamic item counts and labels for SaaS dashboards
Implementing scrollable content showcases with button-based navigation for media sites
ai_summary: A horizontal image carousel component with smooth scroll animations and arrow-based navigation. Features item cards displaying images, titles, counts, and count labels. Uses Framer Motion for animations and detects scroll position to enable/disable navigation buttons. Ideal for displaying trending content, featured media, or product showcases in a space-efficient scrollable layout suitable for both desktop and mobile platforms.
